case_title: LABOR COMMISSIONER, STATE OF CALIFORNIA VS. PINOCCHIO, LLC A LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY DBA

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF LABOR COMMISSIONER, STATE OF CALIFORNIA AS TO DEFENDANT PINOCCHIO, LLC A LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY DBA TRATTORIA PINOCCHIO JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
